privileged_info_summary: The task uses Nuxeo Platform 10.10 to manage document lifecycle. All workspace and document names in metadata are verified as correct. The task creates five documents in the /default-domain/workspaces/ClientRecords workspace: three marked for purging (Anderson Account Agreement 2016, Baker Loan Application 2015, Chen Investment Portfolio 2014) and two marked for preservation (Davis Mortgage Records 2018, Evans Trust Documents 2019). The task data is synthetic, generated using ReportLab PDF library with fictional ACME Corporation content.
